product_overview: RedFlag helps legal teams review litigation documents for contradictions, date conflicts, and cross-reference inconsistencies before opposing counsel finds them. Users can upload case files, ask questions about the documents, and adjust AI model provider settings through the app.
core_goals: Explore the product from the home page
Ask questions about uploaded documents and review answers
Receive a prompt to upload documents before querying when no files are present
Open the book-a-demo popup from the marketing page
Switch between the Playground and Configuration views

features.name: Landing page navigation
features.description: A marketing home page that lets users explore the product and access key entry points.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Review the home page content -> Click through the clickable home page elements -> Reach the linked destination

features.name: Book a demo popup
features.description: A demo request action on the marketing page that opens a popup screen.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Open the book-a-demo action -> See the pop-up screen appear

features.name: Document question answering in Playground
features.description: A playground for interacting with uploaded litigation documents and asking questions about them.
user_flows: Navigate to the Playground view -> Ask a question without uploading any files -> See the message asking to upload documents first before asking questions
Navigate to the Playground view -> Upload litigation documents -> Ask a question about the uploaded documents -> Review the analysis response cited to source

features.name: Sidebar navigation
features.description: A sidebar that lets users move between the Playground and Configuration areas.
user_flows: Navigate to the Playground view -> Use the sidebar to switch to Configuration -> See the Configuration view
Navigate to the Configuration view -> Use the sidebar to switch to Playground -> See the Playground view

features.name: AI model provider configuration
features.description: A configuration panel for adjusting AI provider settings used by the app.
user_flows: Navigate to the Configuration view -> Review the available provider settings -> Update the model provider configuration -> Save the changes

project.name: RedFlag
project.description: Find contradictions in case files before opposing counsel does. Upload litigation documents, RedFlag finds contradictions, date conflicts, and cross-reference inconsistencies cited to source.

features: Landing page with hero section, marketing sections, navigation bar
Playground view for interacting with document analysis
Configuration panel for AI model provider settings
Litigation file intelligence - contradiction detection, cross-reference mapping, amendment chain tracking
Sidebar navigation between Playground and Configuration views
